Team

Artisan Clinic is a modern plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine clinic in Warsaw. Our name is no coincidence — it comes from two words that are important to us: art, meaning craft, and sanatio, meaning healing. Artisan is a name that reflects our sense of aesthetics, harmony, beauty, precision, and respect for the patient's health.

dr n. med. Tadeusz St. Witwicki
Specialist in plastic, reconstructive, and aesthetic surgery.
dr n. med. Maciej Mazurek
Specialist in plastic surgery
dr hab. n. med. Piotr Pietruski
Specialist in plastic and reconstructive surgery

Specialist in aesthetic medicine

dr n. med. Tadeusz St. Witwicki

Specialist in plastic, reconstructive, and aesthetic surgery.

He gained experience under the guidance of his parents — doc. Zofia Witwicka, an outstanding plastic surgeon and laryngologist, and prof. Tadeusz Witwicki, an orthopedic specialist.

He studied at the Warsaw Medical Academy and completed training in Beijing, Glasgow, Los Angeles,
and Ghent. He obtained his specialization in plastic surgery at the Department of Plastic Surgery of the Medical Center for Postgraduate Education in Warsaw. His specialization supervisor was the founder of Polish plastic surgery, prof. Michal Krauss. He regularly participates in European conferences in his field of specialization (including Paris, Rome, Milan, Stockholm, and Oslo). He has been running his own medical practice for over 20 years.

Founding member of the Polish Society of Aesthetic Medicine and Anti-Aging. Regular member of the Polish Society of Plastic, Reconstructive, and Aesthetic Surgery, and member of the Organizing Committee of the 1st PTCHPRiE Congress. Member of the Polish Society of Oncological Surgery.

International Trainer of APTOS Revitalizing and Lifting Techniques, SlimLipo method trainer in Poland, and conducts training for physicians in the field of breast reconstruction.

Author of numerous publications in the field of plastic and reconstructive surgery.

dr n. med. Maciej Mazurek

Specialist in plastic surgery

He specializes in plastic surgery of the face and breasts, particularly in advanced Deep Plane facelift procedures. He graduated from the 1st Faculty of Medicine at the Medical University of Warsaw in 2014 with honors. He completed his specialization training in plastic surgery at the West Pomeranian Center for Severe Burns Treatment and Plastic Surgery and at the Clinical Department of Plastic Surgery of the Medical Center for Postgraduate Education in Warsaw, passing the specialization exam with distinction.

To expand his skills, he completed a training fellowship at one of the largest plastic surgery centers in the United Kingdom — St Andrews Centre for Plastic Surgery and Burns.

In 2020, he defended his doctoral thesis in the field of plastic and oncological breast surgery. This work is particularly relevant to Dr. Mazurek's clinical practice and covers the use of modern technologies in plastic surgery of the breast, face, and abdomen.

In his private life, he is passionate about active recreation, a healthy lifestyle, and water sports.

dr hab. n. med. Piotr Pietruski

Specialist in plastic and reconstructive surgery

Dr. hab. n. med. Piotr Pietruski is a specialist in plastic surgery. He graduated from the 2nd Faculty of Medicine at the Medical University of Warsaw in 2011. He validated his medical degree in the USA by passing the USMLE exam. In 2019, he obtained his specialization in plastic surgery by passing the national specialization exam with distinction. In 2018, during his residency in plastic surgery, he received his PhD in medical sciences, and was awarded his habilitation degree in 2020. In 2023, after completing a 2-year specialization program at the Autonomous University of Barcelona, he became the first Polish plastic surgeon to obtain the European specialist title in oncological, reconstructive, and aesthetic breast surgery (Master’s Degree in Surgical Oncology, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Breast Surgery — MRBS, 2020). He has completed numerous clinical fellowships in aesthetic and reconstructive plastic surgery in Stockholm, Zurich, Ghent, Barcelona, London, as well as in Australia and the USA. He not only strives to follow the trends of modern plastic surgery but also to set them. He is the author of numerous scientific publications on plastic surgery in the most prestigious international journals. In 2020, the American Society of Plastic Surgeons (ASPS), together with the most renowned journal Plastic and Reconstructive Surgery, honored his work as the best publication of 2020 on aesthetic breast surgery. In 2022, at the 7th World Rhinoplasty Congress in Bergamo, he received the Luca Ortelli Award for his concept of nasal analysis. In pursuit of perfection in plastic surgery, he collaborates scientifically with medical centers in Sweden, Australia, and the USA. From 2019 to 2021, as an assistant professor, he lectured on plastic surgery for physicians in training. He is currently a guest lecturer in plastic surgery at the Medical University of Warsaw. He collaborates with the Department of Plastic Surgery at the Lublin Region Oncology Center, where he performs complex reconstructive surgeries of the breast and face.
Dr. Pietruski specializes in plastic surgery of the breast, abdomen, and face. He places particular emphasis on preoperative patient education and makes every effort to ensure the best possible treatment outcomes.

He is a member of the Polish Society of Plastic, Reconstructive, and Aesthetic Surgery (PTCHPRiE) and the International Society of Aesthetic and Plastic Surgery (ISAPS).

dr n. med. Sławomir Mazur

Specialist in oncological surgery

Dr. n. med. Slawomir Mazur graduated from the Faculty of Medicine at the Warsaw Medical Academy in 1984. That same year, he began working at the Institute of Oncology in Warsaw at ul. Wawelska 15. Under the guidance of his mentor, prof. Andrzej Kulakowski, he acquired successive surgical qualifications, including a specialization in oncological surgery.

In 1999, he defended his doctoral thesis on the topic of “Assessment of the interdependence between estrogen receptor, progesterone receptor, and epidermal growth factor receptor status and the clinical course of breast cancer.”

He currently works at the Department of Breast Cancer and Reconstructive Surgery at the Maria Sklodowska-Curie National Research Institute of Oncology in Warsaw, where he primarily performs breast reconstruction surgeries.

He was the first to introduce autologous adipose-derived stem cells for therapeutic purposes in tissue regeneration and breast reconstruction at the clinic.

He is the author and co-author of dozens of scientific papers, including the chapter on breast reconstruction in the latest Oncological Surgery textbook.

For over 25 years, he has been collaborating with and serving as a physician for the Warsaw Amazons (breast cancer survivors' organization). He is directly affiliated with the Amazons Club Warsaw Center.

dr n. med. Justyna Jończyk

Specialist in plastic surgery

I am a graduate of the Wroclaw Medical University, where I gained a solid theoretical and practical foundation in medicine. I completed part of my studies through an international exchange program at the University of Barcelona in Spain, which allowed me to gain valuable experience in an international environment. I passed the National Medical Examination with one of the highest scores in the country.

I completed my specialization in plastic surgery at the Department of Plastic Surgery of the University Clinical Center in Gdansk, where I developed my skills for many years under the guidance of outstanding specialists. I am a member of the Polish Society of Plastic, Reconstructive, and Aesthetic Surgery, which reflects my commitment to professional development and continuous improvement of qualifications.

My professional interests focus on breast and facial surgery, with particular emphasis on nosee surgery, eyelid surgery, and face and neck lifting. I refined my skills in these areas under the guidance of the best European specialists from Italy, the Netherlands, and France. I continuously improve my professional qualifications by participating in numerous courses and training programs to provide my patients with the highest standard of medical care.

In my work, I prioritize patient safety and comfort, striving to approach each case with empathy and full commitment. My approach to work is comprehensive, stemming from a fascination with longevity medicine and an understanding of cellular aging processes.

In my private life, I am passionate about extreme sports and baking. My perfectionism, while sometimes challenging for those closest to me, translates into achieving excellent surgical outcomes.

dr Natalia Winiarska

Specialist in aesthetic medicine

Graduate of the Faculty of Medicine at the Medical University of Warsaw. Certified Aesthetic Medicine Physician. Author of scientific publications in the fields of aesthetic medicine, plastic surgery, and ophthalmology. She continuously expands her knowledge by participating in training programs and scientific conferences. She performs regenerative treatments focused on improving skin quality, restoring its healthy appearance and radiance. She emphasizes subtle, natural results that highlight each patient's individual beauty. She specializes in surgical eyelid correction (blepharoplasty).

lek. Beata Mitręga-Korab

Specialist in general surgery, oncological surgery, and otolaryngology

She graduated from the Warsaw Medical Academy, Faculty of Medicine. In 1986, she completed her specialization in general surgery (1st degree), oncological surgery, and otolaryngology (1st degree).

Since 1997, she has been affiliated with the Oncology Center, Head and Neck Cancer Clinic, Department of Reconstructive and Plastic Surgery. Over the years, she also worked at the Department of General Surgery and Thoracic Diseases at the Central Clinical Hospital in Warsaw on Banacha Street, the Department of Otolaryngology at the Central Clinical Hospital in Warsaw on Banacha Street, and the Children's Hospital in Warsaw on Nieklanska Street, where she gained experience and expanded her knowledge. She currently works at the Department of Soft Tissue, Bone, and Melanoma Cancers.

Dr. Beata Mitrega-Korab specializes in diagnoseing and treating skin lesions and tumors, including skin cancers and melanomas — especially those located in the head and neck area. She specializes in performing skin grafts and reconstructing defects using advanced skin flap techniques. She also applies her experience and knowledge in surgery of salivary glands, soft tissue tumors, and lymph nodes.

dr n. med. Aleksander Grous

Specialist in general and oncological surgery

Graduate of the Warsaw Medical Academy in 1998, PhD in medical sciences, specialist in general surgery and oncological surgery. Long-standing researcher at the Warsaw Medical Academy (now the Medical University of Warsaw), as well as the Medical Center for Postgraduate Education, and deputy head of the Department of Oncological Surgery at the European Health Center. Academic lecturer. Currently a specialist at the Department of Breast Cancer and Reconstructive Surgery at the National Research Institute of Oncology in Warsaw.

Fellow of the Polish Society of Surgeons at the Department of Surgery of the Medical University of Leuven in Belgium.

Member of the Polish Society of Oncological Surgery.

lek. Aleksandra Latała

Specialist in aesthetic medicine

My name is Aleksandra Latala, and I am a graduate of the Medical University of Warsaw, Faculty of Medicine, and a certified Aesthetic Medicine Physician. I continuously expand my knowledge by participating in scientific conferences and training programs. In my work, my priority is skin quality and a healthy appearance — I believe that beauty starts with health. With dedication and precision, I create individualized treatment plans that help my patients enjoy a natural and radiant appearance.

In my private life, I am passionate about radiology, downhill skiing, tennis, and water sports.
